body.body: Three problems identified 2026-03-18: (1) preparse() always routes to OLLAMA_REASONING_HOST with no timeout (now patched to 8s) — but during daytime cloud_mode is active and preparse should not hit Ollama at all. Gate preparse on cloud_mode or remove it entirely (thalamus rule-based is already doing the same job). (2) Cloud inference timing out during day — NE daemon + winnow + main inference all hitting OR simultaneously, competing for per-key rate limit. Need serialization or dedicated purpose keys. (3) Long-term: preparse is an LLM doing what thalamus already does. With trail infrastructure, thalamus + word graph should be sufficient for intent classification. Preparse may be deletable. Design conversation required — L-size.
body.title: Inference pipeline architecture review — preparse, cloud routing, OR contention
body.result: Closed as superseded by D198 (3-profile binary routing, T-gateway-simplify #320). All three issues resolved: (1) preparse removed entirely, (2) inference engine proxy rebuilt with binary routing, (3) OR contention addressed by clean routing separation. No further implementation required.
